context_for_next_testing_agent: PayrollCheckRecordsSection successfully extracted from AdminDashboard.jsx. Component file at /app/frontend/src/components/admin/sections/PayrollCheckRecordsSection.jsx (703 lines). Receives getAuthHeader prop and manages its own state. All CRUD operations (Create via upload, Read via list/view, Update via edit, Delete) working. Component auto-fetches check records on mount. Test data includes 2 check records with Facebook logo placeholder images.
